notes: ISSN uniquely identifies serial publications (journals, magazines, etc.). Format: NNNN-NNNX where X is digit or check character X.

data.description: ISSN for serial publications in NNNN-NNNX format where X is a check digit (0-9 or X).
data.notes: ISSN is assigned by the ISSN International Centre in Paris. The last character is a check digit that may be X (representing 10). Print and electronic editions of the same serial receive different ISSNs. The ISSN-L (linking ISSN) groups related ISSNs.
